(D) kite
(E) line

(G) pentagon
(H) rectangle

The path draws a closed shape with 5 points: (53.73, 61.64), (50.59, 49.13), (61.50, 52.50), (66.59, 62.74), and back to (53.73, 61.64). A shape with 5 sides is a pentagon.

Therefore, the answer is (G) pentagon.

A four-sided shape is a quadrilateral.
